description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named iOS that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests to master, and on published releases, ignoring changes to *.md and docs/**. The workflow should build an iOS package using CMake and upload it as an artifact or to a release. Use a macos-latest job with steps to check out the code, cache the CMake build folder, configure CMake for iOS, build the package, and upload or release it.
